headline: Ninepoint Partners Announces Anticipated Monthly Cash Distributions for its new US Stock Ninepoint HighShares ETFs
summary: TORONTO, April 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ninepoint Partners LP (“Ninepoint Partners”) today announced the anticipated initial monthly distributions for its new US single-stock Ninepoint HighShares ETFs, launched today. The first monthly distribution amounts for the ETFs are expected to be paid on or about May 7, 2026, to securityholders of record on April 30, 2026.
